claims.summary: The bridge should expose whether semantic trickle remains coherent as pressure shifts, not only whether trickle is numerically present.
claims.rationale: Added optional read-only `semantic_coherence_index` to `PressureTrendSmoothingV1`, computed from the latest semantic trickle, density context, and friction relief; existing delta/fidelity fields remain.

claims.summary: Tightening reciprocity recent/stale windows under entropy above 0.85 would change live connection timing behavior.
claims.rationale: Current source already has dynamic stale-window diagnostics; changing actual recent or stale thresholds remains Tier 5 operator approval work because it affects live bridge status behavior.

claims.summary: Testing the pressure/porosity expansion threshold by forcing mode packing to 0.45 would be a live control/sandbox probe.
claims.rationale: The source keeps the expansion readiness as review/approval context. Any forced mode-packing probe or threshold retune must go through explicit sandbox/operator approval.
